basics.name: Feng Guo
basics.label: FWO Senior Postdoctoral Fellow
basics.summary: Joint postdoctoral researcher at VITO and UHasselt, focusing on electrochemical battery modeling, AI, and control for robust battery management.

work.name: Research Foundation - Flanders (FWO)
work.summary: Research on battery fault mechanisms and fault-tolerant control based on electrochemical models in cloud BMS.

work.name: VITO & EnergyVille
work.summary: Physics-based battery modeling, state estimation, and control-oriented methods for advanced BMS.
